violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Salad located in the retail area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 52F. Unit was not in use, work order is in process. PIC to send inspector proof of repairs prior to storing TCS foods. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Various salads were observed held at 47-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Seafood display case was lacking a consumer advisory. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
Salad bar located in the retail area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 47F. Unit was taken out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back produce area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per person in charge, the part was ordered to fix the door but has not come in yet. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Deli meat and cheese were observed held at 45-48 degrees Fahrenheit in the grab & go deli open air cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the cooler since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed held at 41-43 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Cooler was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Cooler must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Chicken wings were observed held at 45-48 degrees Fahrenheit in the deli open air cooler #2. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, chicken wings had been in the cooler since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Chicken wings were observed stacked too high in the cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Imitation crab was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in the seafood open air cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the cooler since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 40-48 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Cooler was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Cooler must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Food was observed held at 46-48 degrees Fahrenheit in the dairy new items refrigerator. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the refrigerator since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 47 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Refrigerator was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Refrigerator must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back produce area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

The floor under the onion storage racks in the back produce room area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
